creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sat Aug 18 16:04:37 2012
New Revision: 302725
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/302725

Log:
  - Update to 1.6.11
  
  PR:		ports/170500
  Submitted by:	Rouslan Iskhakov <rouslan@rshell.net> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/facter/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/facter/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/sysutils/facter/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/sysutils/facter/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/facter/Makefile	Sat Aug 18 14:29:08 2012	(r302724)
+++ head/sysutils/facter/Makefile	Sat Aug 18 16:04:37 2012	(r302725)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	facter
-PORTVERSION=	1.6.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.6.11
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils ruby
 MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads.puppetlabs.com/facter/
 
@@ -17,15 +17,18 @@ NO_BUILD=	yes
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
 
-.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
+MAN8=		facter.8
+MANCOMPRESSED=	yes
 
-do-install:
-	cd ${WRKSRC} && \
-	${SETENV} PREFIX=${PREFIX} ${RUBY} ${WRKSRC}/install.rb
+.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 # Restrict dmidecode dependency to i386 and amd64 systems
 .if ${ARCH} == "amd64" || ${ARCH} == "i386"
-RUN_DEPENDS=	dmidecode:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/dmidecode
+RUN_DEPENDS=    dmidecode:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/dmidecode
 .endif
 
+do-install:
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && \
+	${SETENV} PREFIX=${PREFIX} ${RUBY} ${WRKSRC}/install.rb
+
 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>

Modified: head/sysutils/facter/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/facter/distinfo	Sat Aug 18 14:29:08 2012	(r302724)
+++ head/sysutils/facter/distinfo	Sat Aug 18 16:04:37 2012	(r302725)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (facter-1.6.8.tar.gz) = 79e178e191ffc32f6e5b0812c07256802afc3506e2aa8c8538773646c3a46335
-SIZE (facter-1.6.8.tar.gz) = 119323
+SHA256 (facter-1.6.11.tar.gz) = f88e26607f0d1af7cd95c2015129d74eb6e494e32f90ba223f3929ba6c12993c
+SIZE (facter-1.6.11.tar.gz) = 133988

==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/facter/pkg-plist	Sat Aug 18 14:29:08 2012	(r302724)
+++ head/sysutils/facter/pkg-plist	Sat Aug 18 16:04:37 2012	(r302725)
@@ -21,8 +21,12 @@ bin/facter
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/kernelmajversion.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/kernelrelease.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/kernelversion.rb
-%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsb.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbdistcodename.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbdistdescription.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbdistid.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbdistrelease.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbmajdistrelease.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/lsbrelease.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/macaddress.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/macosx.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/manufacturer.rb
@@ -64,6 +68,7 @@ bin/facter
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/plist/generator.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/plist/parser.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/processor.rb
+%%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/registry.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/resolution.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/uptime.rb
 %%RUBY_SITELIBDIR%%/facter/util/values.rb
